subject: advice?
body: I'm meeting with the president of Dassault (Falcon jets) today about Mission Air. I have a presentation and I'm ready to talk about my startup but how do I make him take me seriously?
body_html: I'm meeting with the president of Dassault (Falcon jets) today about Mission Air. I have a presentation and I'm ready to talk about my startup but how do I make him take me seriously?
